# agent-routing (audit X6 fixture — explanatory clauses but no actionable instruction)

## Codex Fast (opt-in)

**Cross-auditor never consumes `codex.model_fast`.** Audit reasoning depth is non-negotiable; Fast is developer-codex-only.

`@codex-fast` is intentionally not a valid spec pre-tag: Fast is orchestrator-time dispatch driven by user config, not a step property.
